falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below its 200-day moving average by more than 3%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in the trend rather than a bottom formation, invalidating the pattern match to bottom_2024_aug.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 90-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal extreme market stress, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a blowoff top rather than a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. unemployment rate jumps to 6.5% or higher in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This macroeconomic shock would override the pattern-based call, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect by introducing a clear external catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
